snippet: Fundraising activities may be undertaken: Fundraising activities can be organised by: any other member(s) of the school community. Activity organisers must: To ensure events are effective and achieve their goals and objectives, the risks to their delivery must be identified and assessed. This should take into account risks in relation to: Important: Schools must manage any incidents or hazards that are identified during fetes or other school fundraising activities in accordance with department policy, refer to Reporting and Managing School Incidents .
